items.claim: Tabatha Ricci is more durable than Amanda Ribas.
items.quote: Ricci is just a lot more durable than Ribas.

items.claim: Fatima Kline's striking has improved significantly.
items.quote: it looks like her striking has to gotten really, really good.

items.claim: Fatima Kline's only loss occurred because she moved up a weight class to fight a larger opponent.
items.quote: Her one loss comes, you know, when she went up a weight class against a much bigger Jasmine Jasudavicius.

items.claim: Tabatha Ricci will be unable to match Fatima Kline's striking volume and speed.
items.quote: I don't think Ricci's going to be able to hang with the striking, with the volume, with the speed

items.claim: Stuart Niccol lacks the wrestling ability to take fights to the ground against UFC-level competition.
items.quote: the one knock, and it's a big knock, and it's a big problem on Stuart Nickel, is the wrestling. The wrestling's non-existent
